catalog_notes: Session 6 v0.1.1. Expanded from 3 to 7 entries with sourced thermophysical data. Thermophysical properties (latent heat, cp, target temp) sourced from NASA reports and peer-reviewed literature. mass/charge/discharge limits are trade-study estimates. research_required=true on all entries. BEST-SOLVE-001 partially resolved: thermophysical data sourced, sizing data still estimated.

entries.label: Al-12%Si Eutectic PCM (Zone C Buffer, ~855K)
entries.basis_note: Melting point 582°C (855K), latent heat 512.6 J/g — Frontiers in Energy Research 2024, Al-12Si/ceramic composite PCM characterization. cp ~960 J/kg·K from Al-alloy DSC data. capacity = 35kg × 512600 J/kg. mass/charge limits are trade-study estimates for 50kW node eclipse buffer.

entries.label: Al-33.6%Cu Eutectic PCM (Zone C Buffer, ~821K)
entries.basis_note: Latent heat 319.5 J/g — 2025 Al-33.6 mass% Cu eutectic thermal properties study. Eutectic temp ~548°C (821K) from Al-Cu binary phase diagram. cp estimated from Al-alloy class. capacity = 55kg × 319500 J/kg. mass/charge limits are trade-study estimates.

entries.label: LiF-20%CaF2 Eutectic PCM (High-Temp Zone C, ~1040K)
entries.basis_note: Melt temperature 1040K, latent heat 815 kJ/kg — NASA reference storage system for Brayton-Cycle Solar Dynamic systems (LiF-20CaF2 Table 1). Corroborated by NASA TES-1/TES-2 flight experiment docs. cp estimated from fluoride salt class. capacity = 28kg × 815000 J/kg. mass/charge limits estimated.

entries.label: SiC Sensible Store (Refractory Buffer, 800–1600K)
entries.basis_note: cp ~1200 J/kg·K at 1000°C from SiC/SiC composites thermophysical properties refs and Hexoloy SA SiC datasheet. capacity = 55kg × 1200 J/kg·K × (1600-1200K) = 26.4MJ sensible at ΔT=400K; full range 66MJ. mass/charge limits estimated for refractory buffer at 50kW node.

entries.label: Graphite Sensible Store (Ultra-High-Temp, 500–3000K)
entries.basis_note: cp ~1700 J/kg·K at high temperature from Entegris/POCO Graphite Properties Table 15-2 and cp-vs-T curve to 3000°C. capacity = 30kg × 1700 J/kg·K × (3000-500K)/2 ≈ rough range ref. mass/charge limits estimated. Ultra-high-temp reference class; containment and oxidation protection critical design constraint.

entries.label: PCM Eutectic Store — Generic (BEST-SOLVE-001, superseded by pcm_al12si)
entries.basis_note: Original BEST-SOLVE-001 placeholder. Superseded by pcm_al12si (sourced). Retained for backward compatibility. All values estimated. Use pcm_al12si for new runs.

entries.label: Sensible Refractory Store — Generic (BEST-SOLVE-001, superseded by sensible_sic)
entries.basis_note: Original BEST-SOLVE-001 placeholder. Superseded by sensible_sic (sourced). Retained for backward compatibility. All values estimated. Use sensible_sic for new runs.

entries.label: Custom (Operator-Specified)
entries.basis_note: All values must be specified by operator.
